name: Bioanalytical Sample Receiver
description: Receives and registers biological samples for bioanalytical testing

name: Bioanalytical Chemical Analyst
description: Performs chemical analysis, method validation, and data interpretation

name: Bioanalytical Pharmacist
description: Validates pharmaceutical quality and bioequivalence studies

name: Bioanalytical Researcher
description: Conducts bioanalytical research and method development

name: Bioanalytical Lab Supervisor
description: Supervises laboratory operations and approves sample processing

name: Bioanalytical Study Director
description: Manages bioequivalence studies and approves study protocols

name: Bioanalytical QA Officer
description: Ensures quality assurance and regulatory compliance

name: Bioanalytical Data Manager
description: Manages analytical data and generates reports
